div1.entryFree: Uncleanly, foul, filthy: the very u. flux of a cat, As III, 2, 70. the u. savours of a slaughterhouse, John IV, 3, 112. In a moral sense, == indecent, unbecoming: courtesy would be u., if courtiers were shepherds, As III, 2, 51. u. scruples fear not you, John IV, 1, 7. some u. apprehension . . . in session sit with meditations lawful, Oth. III, 3, 139.
